recommendations.title: Made in Italy
recommendations.overview: Riko is an honest and hardworking man who can count on a group of real friends and a loving wife. Things change after he loses his job and experiences a midlife crisis.

recommendations.title: Management
recommendations.overview: A traveling art saleswoman tries to shake off a flaky motel manager who falls for her and won't leave her alone.

recommendations.title: My Friends
recommendations.overview: Four inseparable friends try to face their midlife crisis with daytrips and pranks at the expense of their families and the people around them.

recommendations.title: 17 Again

recommendations.title: Love Exposure
recommendations.overview: The story of a teenage boy called Yu, who falls for Yoko, a girl he runs into while working as an upskirt photographer in an offshoot of the porn industry. His attempts to woo her are complicated by a spot of cross-dressing – which convinces Yoko tha

recommendations.title: The Disappearance of Haruhi Suzumiya
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Science Fiction, Mystery, Drama
recommendations.overview: A week before Christmas, Kyon wakes up in a world where the SOS Brigade doesn't exist. Mikuru and Yuki don't recognize him, and Haruhi and Itsuki seem to have vanished.

recommendations.title: Panic
recommendations.overview: Alex is going through a midlife crisis and it has become a very difficult time for him. His marriage is struggling, he's worried about his son, and his job of killing people for his family has become the most stressful part of his life. He seeks the

recommendations.title: Still Fabulous
recommendations.overview: Stuck in a dead-end career and on a string of terrible dates, the life of 30-something Maddalena is a total mess until one day, she meets an unlikely imaginary friend who comes to her in the form of real-life porn star Valentina Nappi. Her mission? T

recommendations.title: Hichki
recommendations.overview: Hichki presents a positive and inspiring story about a woman who turns her biggest weakness into her biggest strength.
